name: personal-reading-radar
description: A learned personal reading digest that verifies sources and delivers to chat, email, Slack, PDF/EPUB, or Kindle.

interface.shortDescription: Learned reading digest and delivery loop
interface.longDescription: Set up a personal reading radar that learns from interactions, verifies links, dates, and recency, avoids repeats, and delivers digests to the surfaces a user chooses.
defaultPrompt: Set up a personal reading radar for me.
Run my reading digest and learn from my feedback.
